summary: A nicely recorded, solid show highlighted by a superb The Other One and China > Rider, though the Scarlet Begonias falls flat.
review: The performance is generally strong – the first set delivers a good Stranger, an opium‑bliss solo on The Other One, and bouncy transitions through China > Rider and Women Are Smarter. Recording quality is described as “pretty nice” and better than other archive copies, but no source details are given; the only musical blemish noted is a weak Scarlet Begonias.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review (3‑star) provides mixed feedback: solid show and decent recording versus a few performance flaws, leading to an overall average rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls the recording "pretty nice" and better than another archive version; no specific sound issues are mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is solid with a nice Stranger and strong early numbers; transitions are smooth, especially China > Rider and the bouncy groove that carries through to Women Are Smarter.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for vocals on The Other One, an "opium‑blissful" solo, tasty licks on China > Rider, but criticized for forgetting lyrics on Scarlet Begonias.
